response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages, platforms, and domains, including C++ during his time at National Instruments. However, his recent work has been heavily focused on JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and Dlang, with limited recent exposure to C++ for industrial automation or cloud platforms. His lack of direct experience with IEC 62443, message brokers, or IoT protocols like MQTT raises concerns. While his technical breadth is impressive, the gap in core C++ and industrial cybersecurity experience may impact his immediate fit for this role.
strengths: Strong C++ experience from National Instruments, including component development in LabWindows/CVI
Demonstrated ability to mentor teams and organize coding workshops, indicating leadership potential
Proven track record in scalable, high-performance systems across diverse domains (e.g., real-time data handling at dunnhumby)
concerns: Limited recent C++ experience (last significant role was in 2015) and no clear application of C++ to industrial automation or cloud platforms
No explicit mention of secure development lifecycle (SDL) or IEC 62443 standards, critical for this role
Lacks experience with message brokers, MQTT, REST APIs for IoT, or industrial protocols (Modbus TCP/IP, OPC UA, etc.)

key_factors.factor: Experience with IoT protocols (MQTT) and message brokers
